name.text: Calculating the area of an heptagon

questiontext.text:
A school is designing a flower garden in the shape of a regular heptagon. Each side has length {#s#} m, and the apothem is {#a#} m.

[[jsxgraph width="400px" height="400px"]] var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(divid, { boundingbox: [-8, 8, 8, -8], axis: false, showNavigation: false, showCopyright: false }); var n = 7; var R = 5; /* 1. Create Vertices */ var points = []; for (var i = 0; i < n; i++) { /* Rotating slightly to ensure a side is clearly angled for the label */ var angle = (2 * Math.PI * i / n) + (Math.PI / 2); points.push(board.create('point', [R * Math.cos(angle), R * Math.sin(angle)], {visible: false})); } /* 2. Create Polygon */ var poly = board.create('polygon', points, { withLines: true, fillColor: '#dfefff', borders: {strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: '#0072b2'} }); /* 3. Center Point */ var O = board.create('point', [0, 0], {visible: false}); /* 4. Apothem Label (Rotated along the dashed line) */ var M_apo = board.create('midpoint', [points[0], points[1]], {visible: false}); board.create('segment', [O, M_apo], {dash: 2, strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: '#0072b2'}); board.create('text', [ (O.X() + M_apo.X()) / 2, (O.Y() + M_apo.Y()) / 2 - 0.4, "{#a#} m" ], { fontSize: 14, anchorX: 'middle', rotate: function() { /* Calculate angle of the apothem segment */ return Math.atan2(M_apo.Y() - O.Y(), M_apo.X() - O.X()) * 180 / Math.PI; } }); /* 5. Side Length Label (Rotated along the boundary line) */ var pA = points[1]; var pB = points[2]; var M_side = board.create('midpoint', [pA, pB], {visible: false}); board.create('text', [ M_side.X() - 0.5, M_side.Y() + 0.5, "{#s#} m" ], { fontSize: 14, anchorX: 'middle', rotate: function() { /* Calculate angle of the side segment */ var ang = Math.atan2(pB.Y() - pA.Y(), pB.X() - pA.X()) * 180 / Math.PI; /* Flip text if it's upside down (between 90 and 270 degrees) */ return (ang > 90 || ang < -90) ? ang + 180 : ang; } }); [[/jsxgraph]]

Calculate the area of the heptagon.

Area = [[input:ans1]] m2 [[validation:ans1]] [[feedback:prt1]]

generalfeedback.text:
Worked Solution

Step 1: Perimeter

A regular heptagon has 7 equal sides:

The area of a regular polygon is:

\( A = \frac{7}{2} \times \text{side length} \times \text{apothem} \)

\( A = \frac{7}{2} \times {@s@} \times {@a@} \)

\( A = {@ta1@} \text{ m}^2 \)

prtcorrect.text: Correct answer, well done.

prtpartiallycorrect.text: Your answer is partially correct.

prtincorrect.text: Incorrect answer.
